from typing import TypedDict

class ConfigData(TypedDict, total=False):
    debug: bool
    log_level: str
    max_connections: int
    secret_key: str

class ItemPayload(TypedDict, total=False):
    name: str
    quantity: int
    price: float
    discount: float

def get_debug_mode(config: ConfigData) -> bool:
    return config["debug"]

def get_secret(config: ConfigData) -> str:
    return config["secret_key"]

def calculate_total(item: ItemPayload) -> float:
    base = item["quantity"] * item["price"]
    discount = item["discount"]
    return base * (1 - discount)

def get_log_level(config: ConfigData) -> str:
    return config["log_level"]
